name: Mam Tor
description: Iconic ridge walk. Easy stroll up from Mam Nick car park at the top of Winnats Pass. Paragliders launch from the top in good weather.

name: Winnats Pass
description: Dramatic limestone gorge road between Castleton and the Mam Tor ridge.

name: Blue John Cavern
description: Cavern at the top of Winnats Pass, source of the rare Blue John stone. Guided tours.

name: Speedwell Cavern
description: The boat one — underground canal trip at the bottom of Winnats Pass. Pre-book slots, can sell out.

name: Peveril Castle
description: Norman ruin perched above Castleton with sweeping Hope Valley views (English Heritage).

name: Castleton village
description: Pretty stone village with cafés, pubs, and (apparently) excellent ice cream.

name: Go Ape Buxton
description: High-ropes & zip-line course in the trees at Buxton Country Park / Grin Low (next to Poole's Cavern). Treetop Challenge & Junior options. Pre-booking essential.

name: Poole's Cavern
description: Show cave + Buxton Country Park woodland walks (Solomon's Temple folly). Right next to Go Ape. Tours run on the hour.

name: The Climbing Hangar Sheffield
description: Large dedicated bouldering centre (~45 min drive). Drop-in sessions; first-timers need a quick induction.

name: The Climbing Works
description: Iconic Sheffield bouldering wall (~45 min drive). One of the UK's biggest. New climbers need a registration.

name: Awesome Walls Stockport
description: Roped climbing centre with tall walls (~40 min drive west). Induction or NICAS card required for ropes.

name: Stanage Edge (outdoor)
description: Legendary gritstone edge — the spiritual home of UK trad climbing, but also great just to walk along.

name: The Roaches (outdoor bouldering)
description: Gritstone edge right above the accommodation — bouldering and trad classics.

name: Gulliver's Kingdom Matlock Bath
description: Theme park aimed at younger kids (~45 min drive). Timed-entry tickets, cheaper online in advance.

name: Heights of Abraham (Matlock Bath)
description: Cable car up to caverns and woodland playgrounds above Matlock Bath. Combined ticket includes cable car + 2 cavern tours.

name: Chatsworth Farmyard & Playground
description: Big adventure playground + farm animals on the Chatsworth estate. Separate ticket from the house.
